# Detector specification matrix

One row per `ChangeKind` (272 total). Columns fuse the verdict partition (`checker_policy`), default policy (`policy_for`), the weakest evidence layer at which the kind becomes detectable (`scripts/evidence_tiers`), and the example case(s) that demonstrate the kind (`examples/ground_truth.json`). The **Examples** column is capped at 4 links per kind; the full mapping is in `detector-spec.json`.
